name: commercial-legal
description: Reviews vendor agreements, NDAs, and SaaS subscriptions against your sales-side or purchasing-side playbook, tracks renewals and cancel-by deadlines before they're missed, routes escalations to the right approver, and translates reviews into summaries business stakeholders will actually read.

interface.shortDescription: Reviews vendor agreements, NDAs, and SaaS subscriptions against your sales-side or purchasing-side playbook, tracks renewals and cancel-by…
interface.longDescription: Reviews vendor agreements, NDAs, and SaaS subscriptions against your sales-side or purchasing-side playbook, tracks renewals and cancel-by deadlines before they're missed, routes escalations to the right approver, and translates reviews into summaries business stakeholders will actually read. Migrated for Codex as a repo-scoped plugin. V1 supports local files and pasted text by default; remote connectors must be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Use Commercial Legal with local files or pasted text.
